item.title: [englishabuali] The expected impact of the naval blockade on Iran
item.description:
Open
The expected impact of the naval blockade on Iran

Following up on what I wrote here👆 yesterday about the significance of the blockade from Iran’s perspective, Jesse Watters, the Fox News commentator, explains:

The Iranians are losing about $400 million a day due to the blockade (mainly from oil exports) — which amounts to about $13 billion a month.

According to him, after about two weeks of blockade, Iran will be forced to shut down oil wells because it will run out of storage space for the oil it is extracting — oil it cannot export.

This is in parallel to the possibility of “limited strikes” in Iran, which the Trump administration is considering carrying out.

To comment, follow this link

• The United States bears full responsibility for the illegal international blockade and all its consequences.

• We demand compensation from Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, the United Arab Emirates, and Jordan for their participation in the war against Iran.

item.title: [englishabuali] IDF strikes in Lebanon last night and this morning are characterized by wide geographic dispersion – mainly using UAVs.
item.description:
Open
IDF strikes in Lebanon last night and this morning are characterized by wide geographic dispersion – mainly using UAVs.
Below are the results of the strikes according to Lebanese channels:

2 killed in a strike on a vehicle on the Al-Masilhah road in the Nabatieh district.

4 killed in a strike on a building in Sakhmar in the Beqaa area.

3 killed in a strike on the municipal building in the village of Adloun, south of Sidon.

4 killed and 7 wounded in a strike near the hospital in Tebnine in southern Lebanon.

item.title: [englishabuali] This was the cover photo of the Italian magazine L’Espresso this past weekend.
item.description:
Open
This was the cover photo of the Italian magazine L’Espresso this past weekend.

The caption attached to the photo:

Abuse
Annexation of the West Bank, with soldiers cooperating with settlers. Gaza is being destroyed. The advance in Lebanon. Breaching the border in Syria. War against Iran. Ethnic cleansing and massacres. This is how the Zionist right is shaping “Greater Israel.”

##
It’s not hard to imagine the kind of impact a photo like this with such a caption creates in Western Europe—especially among the left-liberal audience and its leaders who dominate Europe.

I wouldn’t be surprised if this was one of the motives behind the unfortunate tweet by German Chancellor Friedrich Merz last night, on the eve of Holocaust Remembrance Day.

##
The photo was taken by an Italian photographer who “just happened” to be passing through the area.

Apparently, there are two photos here that were merged together to present “the poor Palestinian oppressed by the soldier with the sidelocks and weapon.”

The photo caused considerable reputational damage to Israel.

This morning, the Palestinians released a video about 50 seconds long from the event to prove that it’s a real photo reflecting reality.

I believe the video actually diminishes the effect created by the photo.

Here it is for you👇

one comment

item.title: [englishabuali] First, the Palestinian woman in the picture is not alone facing the soldier. With her are several Palestinians dressed i
item.description:
Open
First, the Palestinian woman in the picture is not alone facing the soldier. With her are several Palestinians dressed in rescue uniforms as well as a few photographers.

Second, the Palestinian woman suddenly doesn’t look so helpless. She stands her ground and confronts the soldier on her own initiative. She shouts at him and certainly does not appear “oppressed.”
She is surely aware of the photographers standing around her and tries to provide them with “good moments” – and of course she succeeds, as can be seen on the magazine’s cover.

Third – there is no violence on the part of the soldiers.

The event looks much calmer than what one might imagine when looking at the magazine’s cover photo ☝️.

##
As usual, the Palestinians continue their nonstop efforts at shaping perceptions against Israel. There is an eager audience for this material across Europe.

Antisemitism is intensifying.
That’s its fuel.

2 comments

item.title: [arabworld301news] מכון "סואר אטלס" פרסם תמונות לוויין חדשות ובאיכות גבוהה, המצביעות על הרס נרחב בחלקים ממתחם הצבאי פרצ'ין. התמונות מאפשרות
item.description:
Open
מכון "סואר אטלס" פרסם תמונות לוויין חדשות ובאיכות גבוהה, המצביעות על הרס נרחב בחלקים ממתחם הצבאי פרצ'ין. התמונות מאפשרות ניתוח מדויק יותר של הנזקים שנגרמו לאתר הרגיש הזה.
בדיקת תמונות לפני ואחרי מראה כי מספר מבנים באזור הסמוך לאתר נהרסו לחלוטין. חלק זה של מתחם פרצ'ין נקשר בעבר בדוחות בינלאומיים לניסויים הקשורים ל"חומרי נפץ בעוצמה גבוהה".
השוואת התמונות החדשות לנתונים קודמים מצביעה על כמות גדולה של הריסות ושינויים מבניים במתקן הצבאי.
המתחם הצבאי פרצ'ין נחשב לאחד האתרים האסטרטגיים ביותר של הרפובליקה האסלאמית של איראן , והוא נמצא תחת מעקב לווייני ובינלאומי הדוק.
כבר לפני כשבוע פורסמו דיווחים על פיצוצים חדשים ונזקים למבנים באזור פרצ'ין, ותמונות הלוויין של "סואר אטלס" מאשרות את היקף ההרס הרחב הזה. אף שישראל או ארצות הברית טרם קיבלו באופן רשמי אחריות על התקיפה האחרונה, הממצאים בשטח מצביעים על פגיעה מדויקת נוספת.

מרדכי כ
301 העולם הערבי בטלגרם

 https://t.me/arabworld301news

item.title: [arabworld301news] תמונות ודיווחים חדשים מציגים את קבוצת התקיפה של נושאת המטוסים "יואסאס ג'ורג' ה. וו. בוש" (CSG-10) מבצעת תרגילים מורכבים
item.description:
Open
תמונות ודיווחים חדשים מציגים את קבוצת התקיפה של נושאת המטוסים "יואסאס ג'ורג' ה. וו. בוש" (CSG-10) מבצעת תרגילים מורכבים ורב־משימתיים במים בינלאומיים.
תרגילים אלו נערכו במטרה להגביר את הכשירות המבצעית ואת התיאום בין כוחות ימיים, תת־ימיים ואוויריים. נושאת המטוסים "יואסאס ג'ורג' ה. וו. בוש", יחד עם טייסות האוויר המוצבות עליה, מצטרפת לכוחות חיל הים של ארצות הברית במסגרת המצור הימי האמריקני נגד הרפובליקה האסלאמית.
קבוצת התקיפה 10 נחשבת לאחת היחידות החזקות ביותר של חיל הים האמריקני, והצבתה בכל אזור משדרת מסרים אסטרטגיים ברורים ליריבים ולבעלי ברית כאחד.

מרדכי כ

item.description:
Open
IDF Spokesperson: Overnight, three IDF soldiers were severely injured, and an additional soldier was moderately injured in a close-quarters encounter in southern Lebanon.

In the incident, six additional soldiers were lightly injured.

The soldiers were evacuated to receive medical treatment in a hospital, and their families have been notified.

one comment

item.title: [englishabuali] The photo published today by Amit Segal of the Givati Brigade commander in the "Garden of the Martyrs" of Bint Jbeil (lo
item.description:
Open
The photo published today by Amit Segal of the Givati Brigade commander in the "Garden of the Martyrs" of Bint Jbeil (location attached), together with Hallel Biton Rosen's report on the surrender of 3 Hezbollah fighters in the "capital of the resistance"—are sinking in deeply and tearing Hezbollah supporters apart from within.

Lebanese who support Hezbollah are posting about feelings of humiliation and deep sorrow.
They understand it is only a matter of time (and not much time) until all of Bint Jbeil falls and Hezbollah operatives either surrender or are killed.

This is especially painful for them, even more than in other villages, because of
the blow to the "symbol of the resistance."

To comment, follow this link

item.title: [englishabuali] The capture of Bint Jbeil is one of the most significant psychological events in the current round against Hezbollah.
item.description:
Open
The capture of Bint Jbeil is one of the most significant psychological events in the current round against Hezbollah.
I sincerely hope that Israel will know how to make the most of it.
There are many possible actions that could leave a strong impression on Hezbollah’s consciousness, humiliate it, undermine its standing, and strengthen deterrence against it for years to come.

To comment, follow this link

item.description:

item.title: [arabworld301news] דובר צה״ל:
item.description:
Open
דובר צה״ל: 

תיעוד ממצלמת גוף של לוחם מאיתור אמצעי לחימה בבית אזרחי בדרום לבנון: כוחות חטיבת הנח"ל ממשיכים בפעילות קרקעית ממוקדת

כוחות צוות הקרב החטיבתי הנח״ל בפיקוד אוגדה 162 ממשיכים בפעילות קרקעית ממוקדת בדרום לבנון.

במהלך הפעילות, הכוחות בשיתוף עם חיל האוויר, השמידות עשרות תשתיות של ארגון הטרור חיזבאללה, ביניהן עמדות נ״ט, עמדות תצפית ומחסני אמצעי לחימה.
במהלך סריקות במרחב, אותרו בבית אזרחי מספר אמצעי לחימה של ארגון הטרור חיזבאללה, ביניהם: נשקים מסוג 'קלאצ׳ניקוב', מחסניות, ווסטים צבאיים.

item.title: [amitseg] Netanyahu had already canceled his participation in the official state ceremony marking Holocaust Remembrance Day that t
item.description:
Open
Netanyahu had already canceled his participation in the official state ceremony marking Holocaust Remembrance Day that took place this morning “due to concerns for his safety,” but the Prime Minister’s Office later reversed course and announced at the last minute that the Prime Minister would attend.  

The main ceremony yesterday at Yad Vashem was pre-recorded because of the war. Other upcoming events are also expected to be held in a similar format.  

The Prime Minister’s Office stated: The ceremony was very short, and therefore the Prime Minister’s participation was made possible.

She is the one who is unacceptable... She doesn't care if Iran has nuclear weapons.

Iran would blow up Italy within two minutes if it had the chance.

Do people like the fact that Meloni does nothing to ensure the oil supply?

Does she think the U.S. should do the job for her?

Does she like that? I can't imagine what she's doing. I'm shocked by her.

I thought she had courage, but I was wrong.

She is no longer the same person, and Italy will not be the same country.

Immigration is killing Italy and all of Europe.

item.title: [englishabuali] A painful humiliation for Hezbollah: Despite the speech by Naim Qassem ☝️Hezbollah operatives are throwing down their we
item.description:
Open
A painful humiliation for Hezbollah: Despite the speech by Naim Qassem ☝️Hezbollah operatives are throwing down their weapons and surrendering in Bint Jbeil - "the capital of the resistance"

IDF Spokesperson: Three Hezbollah terrorists including one from the Radwan Force surrendered to IDF soldiers in Bint Jbeil

Yesterday (Monday), IDF soldiers engaged in close-range combat with a Hezbollah terrorist cell in Bint Jbeil, with one of the terrorists coming from the Radwan Force. The soldiers opened targeted fire toward the terrorists.

At the end of the combat, three terrorists laid down their weapons and surrendered to the soldiers. Later the terrorists were transferred for questioning by the IDF. 

##
Apparently, they didn’t have time to watch Qassem’s speech (:

##
Notice that like Hamas, Hezbollah operatives also fight without uniforms inside built-up urban areas. They appear as civilians.

3 comments

item.description:

item.title: [amitseg] Revealed on i24NEWS:
item.description:
Open
Revealed on i24NEWS:

The Attorney General asked Ronen Bar, then head of the Shin Bet, to provide her with materials regarding Minister Ben Gvir’s involvement in police affairs, so that she could use the material in her response to petitions demanding Ben Gvir’s dismissal.  

A year ago, Amit Segal revealed that Ronen Bar had gathered information through his subordinates in the Shin Bet about the minister’s involvement in police operations—an inquiry that later turned into an investigation of the infiltration of Kahanism into the police ranks.  

We can now reveal that the Attorney General had originally requested the details from Bar in order to form her position before the High Court of Justice on the petitions seeking the minister’s dismissal.  

Although Ronen Bar failed to substantiate his initial suspicions, he instructed his subordinates to expand and deepen the investigation and report back to him with findings.  

——  

The secret security service is searching for and collecting material against the political leadership at the direction of the Attorney General and the State Prosecutor, for the purpose of a petition seeking to dismiss the political leadership.

בהמשך: סוכנות הידיעות האיראנית פארס מקטינה בחשיבות האירוע וייתכן ומאשרת רק חלק קטן מהפרטים שהתרחשו.

הסוכנות טוענת כי 2 מטעני חבלה מאולתרים שהוצמדו לרכבים התפוצצו וגרמו ל-3 פצועים קל ונזק למבנים.

יכול להיות גם שערוצי האופוזיציה האיראנים מגזימים במה שהתרחש, ומנגד יכול להיות שערוצי המשטר דווקא מקטינים את האירוע כפי שידוע שהם עושים ולא מאתמול.

חננאל אביב בטלגרם
